_comment: Reference document for creating the EventBridge rule via AWS Console or CLI.
Description: Triggers SelfHealingRecoveryHandler Lambda when monitor detects a service failure

EventPattern._comment: Matches ONLY events where source is selfhealing.local AND detail-type is ServiceFailureDetected

CLICommands._comment: Run these commands to create the rule and add the Lambda target
CLICommands.1_create_rule: aws events put-rule --name SelfHealingFailureRule --event-pattern '{"source":["selfhealing.local"],"detail-type":["ServiceFailureDetected"]}' --state ENABLED --region REGION
CLICommands.2_add_lambda_permission: aws lambda add-permission --function-name SelfHealingRecoveryHandler --statement-id EventBridgeInvoke --action lambda:InvokeFunction --principal events.amazonaws.com --source-arn arn:aws:events:REGION:ACCOUNT_ID:rule/SelfHealingFailureRule --region REGION
